name: Kozani Ice Cake

ingredients.item: (16 ounce) package buttery round crackers, crushed
(3.4 ounce) packages instant vanilla pudding mix
(12 ounce) container frozen whipped topping, thawed
Combine crackers, butter and sugar in a 9x13 inch baking dish and press mixture into sides and bottom of the dish.
In a large bowl, combine milk and ice cream with mixer.
Blend in pudding mix, then pour the mixture into prepared crust.
Top with whipped topping and refrigerate for 3 hours before serving.
